strength.name: Bench Press
strength.description:
4x3 | * Slide the wheely chair back, Heels to floor
* Break the bar, pull bar apart
* Keep breathe in the whole rep | E3MOM 18min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 5 @ 60%
HOLD 4 Sets
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 3 @ 70%
12:00 3 @ 70%
15:00 3 @ 70%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
4 RFT
10 Cal Row
10 C2B
10 DB Bench @ 22.5/15kg

gymnastics:
Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min
Find the maximum weight or lightest band that you can achieve 3 pull ups with

hypertrophy.reasoning: Bench press and DB bench heavily fatigue chest/triceps; rowing and C2B already tax back, but posterior chain needs hypertrophy balance.
suggested_exercises: Nordic Hamstring Curls or Leg Curls: 3x8–10

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Bench Press, 4 by 3 at 70 percent. Gymnastics: Pull-ups: E2MOM 10 min. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 10 Cal Row, 10 C2B, 10 DB Bench @ 22.5/15kg. For hypertrophy, focus on back, legs, rear delts.
